model.input: delta_b Bx/By/Bz plus constant sensor_z_m scalar
model.loss: min-over-3-slot-permutations existence BCE + active component SmoothL1 params + shape CE + mask BCE/Dice + depth RMSE proxy

route_decision: B. run 25.10b failure audit for merged/missed, overlap/touching, slot permutation, and three-component rows
